_patch_meta.description: Session B completion patch for registry 59 (faith). Sets session_b_status to Session B Complete. Also corrects G4101 pistikos (pure nard) from extracted_thin to delete: verse analysis confirms it refers to a type of ointment, not to the faith/faithfulness semantic domain. Recurring applicator anomaly correction included (fifth consecutive registry). Analysis document: WA-59-faith-analysis-20260326.docx (386 paragraphs, 6 parts).

operations.note: Post-analysis correction: G4101 pistikos (pure nard, 2 occ) was classified extracted_thin in PREANALYSIS-V1 on root affinity with pistis. Verse analysis (Mk 14:3; Jn 12:3) confirms it refers to a type of ointment only. No semantic connection to faith/faithfulness. Reclassify to delete.

operations.description: RECURRING APPLICATOR ANOMALY — fifth consecutive registry (98, 34, 160, 126, 59). update_registry in PREANALYSIS patches not executing. OP-001 corrects registry 59 to Session B Complete. Claude Code must resolve before next registry.

Session B analysis complete for registry 59 (faith). Document: WA-59-faith-analysis-20260326.docx. Effective working set: 35 terms (22 extracted, 13 extracted_thin after G4101 correction). Hebrew 23, Greek 12. Key families: aman/emunah, emet, chesed, bagad/maal (breach), pistis/pisteuō, oligopistos, apistia/apistos, elpis. Key finding: faith is relational trust not cognitive assent; faithlessness is moral condition of the heart, not merely intellectual doubt.
